character.definition: to be perverse; to act contrary to, jealous; to envy; jealousy, obstinate; stubborn, fierce; truculent
moistened eyes, to stare in anger or contempt
to melt, to sell, to fling a lance or a spear; to brandish spears as if they were flying
(ancient form of 雷) thunder, mine (an explosive); fuse
follow, listen to, submit; to accompany; subsequently, then; hexagram ䷐
pick up, collect, tidy up; ten
a kind of beast, a kind of mule
